title: paspalum strictum
intro: Paspalum strictum, also known as Button Grass or Button Grass Paspalum, is a perennial grass native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Paspalum strictum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Paspalum strictum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
